ministry_department: Ministry of Women and Child Development
short_description: Maternity benefit of ₹5,000 for pregnant and lactating mothers for first living child.
detailed_description: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY) is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme with the objective of providing partial compensation for the wage loss in terms of cash incentive so that the woman can take adequate rest before and after delivery of the first living child. The cash incentive provided would lead to improved health seeking behaviour amongst the Pregnant Women and Lactating Mothers (PW&LM).
key_benefits: First installment: ₹1,000 on early registration of pregnancy
Second installment: ₹2,000 after 6 months of pregnancy
Third installment: ₹2,000 after child birth and completion of first cycle of vaccination
Direct transfer to beneficiary's bank account
Promotes institutional delivery and antenatal care
occupation_criteria: All (except government employees and PSU employees)
other_conditions: Applicable for first living child only
Pregnant woman should be 19 years or above on the date of conception
Government employees and PSU employees are not eligible
Must register pregnancy at Anganwadi Centre or approved health facility
Must complete antenatal check-ups and vaccination schedule

REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS.description: Mother and Child Protection card from health facility
From registered medical facility or Anganwadi

application_steps_offline: Visit nearest Anganwadi Centre or health facility
Fill Form 1A for first installment with required documents
After 6 months pregnancy, fill Form 1B for second installment
After delivery and vaccination, fill Form 1C for third installment
Amount will be transferred to bank account after verification

submission_locations.address: Local Anganwadi Centre or Primary Health Centre
submission_locations.notes: Register early in pregnancy to avail all three installments

faq.question: Can I apply for second child?
faq.answer: No, PMMVY is applicable only for the first living child of the family.

faq.question: When should I register?
faq.answer: Register as early as possible during pregnancy, preferably in the first trimester to avail all three installments.

faq.question: Are government employees eligible?
faq.answer: No, women who are in regular employment with Central or State Government or PSUs are not eligible.

common_rejection_reasons: Bank account not linked with Aadhaar
tips_for_successful_application: Register pregnancy early at Anganwadi Centre
Keep all medical records and MCP card updated
Link Aadhaar with bank account before applying
Complete all antenatal check-ups on time
Ensure child receives first cycle of vaccination for third installment
